attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <what_happened>Read</what_happened>
  <occurred_at>2026-06-13T03:08:11.009Z</occurred_at>
  <working_directory>/home/cwtrocks/explore-art</working_directory>
  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"/home/cwtrocks/explore-art/docs/exploration/01-art-klass-pointer-corruption-analysis.md\"}"</parameters>
  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"/home/cwtrocks/explore-art/docs/exploration/01-art-klass-pointer-corruption-analysis.md\",\"content\":\"# Android ART Klass 指针损坏问题深度分析\\n\\n[知识来源: Android ART 源码分析 + Web搜索（多引擎并行）]\\n\\n## 1. 问题背景\\n\\n### 1.1 问题描述\\n- **现象**：系统进程发生 Java heap 内存损坏\\n- **具体表现**：类实例的 `klass` 指针指向了完全不同的其他类\\n- **影响**：导致类型检查失败、方法调用错误、运行时崩溃\\n\\n### 1.2 对象内存布局\\n在 ART 中，每个 Java 对象的内存布局如下：\\n\\n```cpp\\n// runtime/mirror/object.h\\nclass Object {\\n  HeapReference<Class> klass_;  // 偏移量 0，指向对象的 Class\\n  uint32_t monitor_;            // 偏移量 4，锁字（Lock Word）\\n  // ... 对象实例字段\\n};\\n\\n// 对象头大小\\nstatic constexpr uint32_t kObjectHeaderSize = 8;  // 8 字节\\n```\\n\\n**关键点**：\\n- `klass_` 是对象的第一个字段（偏移量 0）\\n- 使用 `HeapReference<Class>` 存储（压缩指针）\\n- 这个指针是对象类型识别的基础\\n\\n## 2. Klass 指针的合法修改路径\\n\\n### 2.1 对象分配时的初始化\\n\\n**路径 1：对象创建时设置 klass**\\n```cpp\\n// runtime/mirror/object-inl.h:58-66\\ntemplate<VerifyObjectFlags kVerifyFlags>\\ninline void Object::SetClass(ObjPtr<Class> new_klass) {\\n  // 使用 SetFieldObjectWithoutWriteBarrier（不触发写屏障）\\n  // 因为这发生在对象分配阶段，不需要写屏障\\n  SetFieldObjectWithoutWriteBarrier<false, false, RemoveThisFlags(kVerifyFlags)>(\\n      ClassOffset(), new_klass);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**调用时机**：\\n- `Class::AllocObject()` - 普通对象分配\\n- `Array::Alloc()` - 数组对象分配\\n- 对象 clone 时\\n\\n### 2.2 GC 过程中的对象移动\\n\\n**路径 2：Concurrent Copying GC**\\n```cpp\\n// runtime/gc/collector/concurrent_copying.cc:3433\\nto_ref->SetClass(klass);  // GC 复制对象到新位置时\\n```\\n\\n**关键场景**：\\n- 并发复制 GC 移动对象\\n- 从 from-space 复制到 to-space\\n- 需要重新设置 klass 指针\\n\\n**路径 3：Mark-Compact GC**\\n```cpp\\n// runtime/gc/collector/mark_compact.cc\\n// 在压缩阶段更新对象引用\\nvoid UpdateRef(mirror::Object* obj, MemberOffset offset, \\n               uint8_t* from_begin, uint8_t* from_end)\\n```\\n\\n**特殊注意**：\\n- Mark-Compact GC 会 **原地** 更新引用\\n- 如果 class 对象本身被移动，需要更新所有实例的 klass 指针\\n- 代码注释提到需要先更新类指针再访问类的元数据（见 `mark_compact.cc:2831-2836`）\\n\\n### 2.3 特殊场景：假对象（Fake Objects）\\n\\n```cpp\\n// runtime/gc/collector/concurrent_copying.cc:3290-3294\\nfake_obj->SetClass(java_lang_Object_);  // 或\\nfake_obj->SetClass(int_array_class);\\n```\\n\\n**用途**：\\n- GC 回收失败时填充空洞\\n- 使用 `Object` 或 `int[]` 类型填充未使用的内存\\n- 保持堆的完整性\\n\\n## 3. 潜在的 Klass 指针损坏原因\\n\\n### 3.1 竞态条件（Race Condition）\\n\\n**已知 Bug：b/173676071**\\n```cpp\\n// runtime/gc/collector/concurrent_copying.cc:1073-1096\\nif (UNLIKELY(ref == nullptr && offset == mirror::Object::ClassOffset())) {\\n  // 已验证的竞态条件！\\n  // 重新读取后可能获得有效的 class 指针\\n  for (size_t i = 0; i < 1000; i++) {\\n    usleep(1000);  // 等待 1ms\\n    ref = obj->GetClass<kVerifyNone, kWithoutReadBarrier>();\\n    if (ref != nullptr) {\\n      LOG(ERROR) << \\\"klass pointer found to be null first...\\\";\\n      break;\\n    }\\n  }\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**原因分析**：\\n- GC 标记阶段并发访问对象\\n- 对象正在被移动或更新\\n- CPU 缓存一致性问题\\n- 内存屏障不足\\n\\n### 3.2 Unsafe 操作\\n\\n**危险路径：通过 Unsafe 直接写入**\\n```cpp\\n// runtime/native/sun_misc_Unsafe.cc:180-186\\nstatic void Unsafe_putObject(JNIEnv* env, jobject, jobject javaObj, \\n                             jlong offset, jobject javaNewValue) {\\n  ObjPtr<mirror::Object> obj = soa.Decode<mirror::Object>(javaObj);\\n  ObjPtr<mirror::Object> newValue = soa.Decode<mirror::Object>(javaNewValue);\\n  obj->SetFieldObject<false>(MemberOffset(offset), newValue);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**风险点**：\\n- **offset = 0** 时直接修改 klass 指针！\\n- Java 层代码可以通过 `Unsafe.putObject(obj, 0, anotherClass)` 破坏类型\\n- `Unsafe.putLong(obj, 0, arbitraryValue)` 可以写入任意值\\n\\n**示例恶意代码**：\\n```java\\n// Java 层\\nUnsafe unsafe = getUnsafe();\\nObject victim = new String(\\\"test\\\");\\nClass<?> wrongClass = Integer.class;\\n// 直接修改 klass 指针（offset = 0）\\nunsafe.putObject(victim, 0L, wrongClass);\\n// 现在 victim 的 klass 指向 Integer.class！\\n```\\n\\n### 3.3 JNI 越界写入\\n\\n**场景**：\\n- Native 代码中的缓冲区溢出\\n- 错误的指针运算\\n- 释放后使用（Use-After-Free）\\n\\n**示例**：\\n```cpp\\n// JNI 代码\\njlong* ptr = (jlong*)obj;  // 错误：直接转换对象指针\\nptr[0] = 0x12345678;       // 覆盖 klass 指针\\n```\\n\\n### 3.4 内存对齐和原子性问题\\n\\n**32位系统上的 64位写入**：\\n```cpp\\n// 如果 klass_ 写入不是原子的\\n// 写入过程中可能被打断\\nHeapReference<Class> klass_;  // 在 64 位系统是 4 字节压缩指针\\n```\\n\\n**风险**：\\n- 部分写入（Torn Write）\\n- 在 32 位系统上的 64 位字段更新\\n- 不正确的内存屏障\\n\\n### 3.5 GC 压缩阶段的引用更新错误\\n\\n**Mark-Compact 特殊情况**：\\n```cpp\\n// runtime/gc/collector/mark_compact.cc:1163-1165\\n// 如果 class 指针在黑色稠密区域被提前更新\\n// 而对象还在使用旧的 class 数据，会导致读取错误的元数据\\n```\\n\\n**问题**：\\n- Class 对象本身被移动\\n- 引用更新顺序错误\\n- 某些实例的 klass 未及时更新\\n\\n### 3.6 Read Barrier 失效\\n\\n**并发 GC 的 Read Barrier**：\\n```cpp\\n// runtime/native/sun_misc_Unsafe.cc:72-84\\nif (gUseReadBarrier) {\\n  // 需要确保字段中的引用是 to-space 的\\n  ReadBarrier::Barrier<mirror::Object, false, kWithReadBarrier, true>(\\n      obj.Ptr(), MemberOffset(offset), field_addr);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**如果绕过 Read Barrier**：\\n- 读取到 from-space 的过期指针\\n- CAS 操作使用错误的期望值\\n- 导致类型不一致\\n\\n## 4. 诊断和排查方法\\n\\n### 4.1 立即诊断步骤\\n\\n**步骤 1：检查 klass 指针值**\\n```gdb\\n# GDB 调试\\n(gdb) p/x *(uint32_t*)obj  # 查看 klass 压缩指针\\n(gdb) p obj->klass_\\n(gdb) x/8xw obj            # 查看对象头部内存\\n```\\n\\n**步骤 2：验证指向的 Class 对象**\\n```gdb\\n(gdb) p obj->GetClass()\\n(gdb) p obj->GetClass()->PrettyDescriptor()\\n# 检查是否为合法的 Class 对象\\n```\\n\\n**步骤 3：检查内存保护**\\n```gdb\\n# 查看内存映射\\n(gdb) info proc mappings\\n# 确认对象所在的堆区域是否有效\\n```\\n\\n### 4.2 启用 ART 验证选项\\n\\n**修改 Runtime 启动参数**：\\n```bash\\n# 启用堆验证\\nsetprop dalvik.vm.extra-opts \\\"-XX:HeapVerifyObjectSupport=true\\\"\\n\\n# 启用详细 GC 日志\\nsetprop dalvik.vm.extra-opts \\\"-verbose:gc -Xlog-gc-details\\\"\\n\\n# 启用慢速路径检查\\nsetprop dalvik.vm.extra-opts \\\"-Xverify:all\\\"\\n```\\n\\n### 4.3 代码插桩\\n\\n**在 Object::SetClass 添加日志**：\\n```cpp\\n// runtime/mirror/object-inl.h\\ntemplate<VerifyObjectFlags kVerifyFlags>\\ninline void Object::SetClass(ObjPtr<Class> new_klass) {\\n  // 添加日志\\n  if (klass_.AsMirrorPtr() != nullptr && new_klass != klass_.AsMirrorPtr()) {\\n    LOG(WARNING) << \\\"Changing klass from \\\" << klass_.AsMirrorPtr()->PrettyDescriptor()\\n                 << \\\" to \\\" << new_klass->PrettyDescriptor()\\n                 << \\\" for object at \\\" << this;\\n    // 打印调用栈\\n    DumpNativeStack(LOG_STREAM(WARNING), GetTid());\\n  }\\n  SetFieldObjectWithoutWriteBarrier<false, false, RemoveThisFlags(kVerifyFlags)>(\\n      ClassOffset(), new_klass);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### 4.4 使用 Memory Sanitizer\\n\\n**编译 ART 时启用 ASan**：\\n```bash\\n# Android.bp 中添加\\nsanitize: {\\n    address: true,\\n    hwaddress: true,\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### 4.5 检查 Unsafe 使用\\n\\n**搜索可疑的 Unsafe 调用**：\\n```java\\n// 查找所有 offset = 0 的 Unsafe 操作\\ngrep -r \\\"\\\\.putObject.*\\\\b0\\\\b\\\" --include=\\\"*.java\\\"\\ngrep -r \\\"\\\\.putLong.*\\\\b0\\\\b\\\"
